item.title: Hillary Clinton facing questions from House Oversight Committee in Epstein probe
item.description: Former first lady Hillary Clinton is facing lawmakers' questions over her and her husband's ties to convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.

item.title: WATCH: Exceptional dad reflexes on display
item.description: With the Phillies at bat against the Tigers, a dad makes a backhanded grab all while not spilling his beer.

item.title: DOJ says it's 'reviewing' whether Epstein reports were improperly withheld
item.description: The DOJ vowed to publish any documents that were "improperly" tagged.

item.title: WATCH: Schoolkids' act of kindness goes viral
item.description: A fourth-grade class in Florida is showing what can happen when everyone gives a little bit of love to someone in need.

item.title: Judge to hear arguments over whether Abrego Garcia is being vindictively prosecuted
item.description: A federal judge in Tennessee will hear arguments over whether the government is being vindictive in pursuing a human smuggling case against Kilmar Abr...
